title: AI_OS Night Supervisor Action Intent
description: Wire contract between the read-only Night Supervisor brainstem and the gated effector layer (the 'arms and hands'). An action intent is a PROPOSAL ONLY. It never executes by itself. Execution requires (1) execution_enabled, (2) a matching Human-Owner approval record, (3) an available/held lock, and (4) the effector capability being on the explicit allowlist. Default state of every intent is blocked.

effector.description: Logical effector name. Maps to exactly one hand-script.

effector_script.description: Repo-relative path of the PowerShell hand-script this intent would invoke.

args.description: Named arguments passed to the effector script.

blocked_by_default.description: Always true. Only the dispatcher, with all gates satisfied, may override at run time.
